creator: agh@riseup.net
text:
Created attachment 248088
Sync with main, restore build with cython

Hello,

converters/py-rencode stopped building on my host with 15-CURRENT. I noticed that the PYPI distribution for 1.0.6 lacked the fixed for cython, I also noticed that a number of commits upstream includes some local patches in the Ports. Attached is patch that switchs the build to PEP517 and fetches https://github.com/aresch/rencode/commit/572ff74586d9b1daab904c6f7f7009ce0143bb75.

The build error I was getting:
